productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Durante Beige White Shoe
description: These stylish beige canvas shoes from adidas come with an innovative concept. The high cut and mid cut wearability of these shoes make a trendy and youthful fashion statement. These are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperCotton canvas uppers in beige with option of high cut and mid cut wearabilityFold over fabric in beige and green checksWhite lace-ups for snug FitIconic three stripes symbolizing elegance and durability in green on the sidesMidsoleShock-absorbing rubber midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber toe guard for added protectionDurable gum rubber outsole with multi-directional gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
